tags.name: Snacks and drinks on the go

metaData.Key Information: The KitKat MILO chocolate block is the perfect treat to share with friends and family. Wherever you may be, break off a piece, pass it around and enjoy being the most popular person in the room.

product.name: Nestle Kit Kat 2 Finger Chocolate Bar - Milo

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Milk Solids, Palm Kernel Fat, Cocoa Powder, Malt Extract (Barley), Maltodextrin, Palm Oil, Soya Lecithin, Calcium Phosphate, Magnesium Carbonate, Vanilin, Ascorbic Acid, Disodium Phosphate, Ferric Phyrophosphate, Pyridoxine, Thiamine, Riboflavin, Niacin, Panthothenic acid, Vitamin B12, Biotin
• Contains: Nuts and gluten
metaData.Key Information: Milo nuggets is a companion that encourages you in the little moments in your everyday life and brings out the champion in you. Enjoy Milo nuggets with a unique choco-malt taste that contains all the goodness of Milo.

Kit Kat is a chocolate-coated wafer biscuit bar. Each bar consists of fingers composed of three layers of wafer, covered in an outer layer of chocolate. Each finger can be snapped from the bar separately.

product.name: Nestle Kit Kat Milk Chocolate Pack

offers.description: Buy 1 Nestle Kit Kat Milk Chocolate Pack @ $10.95

product.description: Nestle Kit Kat Chunky is the perfect snack for any break time. It can be enjoyed with family and friends at home, or with colleagues during the day. Have a break, have a Kit Kat.

metaData.Key Information:
• Delicious chocolate bar
• Made of 2 fingers of crispy wafer covered with smooth milk chocolate
• Made with sustainably sourced cocoa from the Nestle Cocoa Plan
• Suitable for vegetarians
metaData.Preparation:
1. Tear the Kit Kat wrapper along the tear strip
2. Eat and enjoy
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

product.name: Nestle Kit Kat Chunky Mini Chocolate Bar - Milk

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Full Cream Milk Powder, Almond, Cocoa Butter, Vegetable Fat (Palm Oil, Sunflower Oil), Thickener (Dextrin), Emulsifier (Soya Lecithin E322), Glazing Agent (E904), Vanilla
• May contain traces of other tree nuts
• Contains permitted flavoring
• Containing thickener, emulsifer and glazing agent as permitted food conditioner
• Allergen information: Made by equipment that contain peanuts, tree nuts, sesame and cereals that contain gluten

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Milk Solids, Cocoa Butter, Glucose Syrup (Sources include Wheat), Barley Malt Extract, Cocoa Mass, Vegetable Fat, Emulsifiers (Soya Lecithin, 492), Wheat Gluten, Raising Agents (501, 500), Salt, Natural Flavour (Vanilla Extract), Pectin
• Milk chocolate contains a minimum of 25% cocoa solids and 22% milk solids
metaData.Key Information: A light honeycomb centre encased in delicious Chocolate, Maltesers are a little bit of naughtiness, but with a light hearted personality and a lot of fun
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store under cool, clean and dry conditions
• Avoid direct sunlight
• Temperature not above 22°C

metaData.Key Information: KitKat introduces KitKat Dark 52%, a richer and darker milk chocolate with 100% cocoa bean from Borneo. The perfect balance of milk chocolate and cocoa solids gives the bar a rich, creamy and smooth texture.
metaData.SAP Product Name: KIT KAT 2F DARK 52 COCOA FROM BORNEO 8S X 17G

metaData.Ingredients:
Milk Chocolate 71% [Sugar, Milk Solids (Cow'S Milk 15%), Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass 9%, Dried Glucose Syrup, Vegetable Fat and Oil (Palm, Illipe, Shea), Emulsifiers (Soya Lecithin, Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate), Natural Flavouring], Wafer 29% [Wheat Flour, Sugar Icing and Sugar, Palm Kernel Stearin, Cocoa Powder, Stabilizers (Sodium Bicarbonate, Calcium Carbonate), Iodized Salt, Emulsifier (Soya Lecithin)].

Allergen Information: Contains Milk, Gluten (From Wheat), Soya. May Contain Peanuts and Tree Nuts.

metaData.Key Information: The ultimate mix for all KitKat fans! With the great KitKat Mini Mix simply everyone comes to the taste. In this great mix you can expect the popular crunchy wafer in the flavors Original, Classic, Salted Caramel, White and Hazelnut. A successful selection that leaves nothing to be desired. 14 individually wrapped crispy wafers with different fillings and chocolate coatings.
